accommodates: dairy, egg, fish, shellfish, peanut, nuts, soy, sesame
ingredients:
h2o
pennywise
fear
screams
flour
salt
directions:
1. make pennywise
2. mix ingredients
3. play it theme song as background music
4. wait an hour
5. perform 4 sets of stretch and folds/coil folds every 30 minutes for 2 hours
6. bulk fermentation
7. pre shape dough
8. final shaping
9. place dough in floured banneton
10. place in fridge for cold proof (1-48hrs)
11. preheat oven
12. preheat dutch oven for 30 min
13. score dough
14. bake covered at 475 degrees for 30 mins then uncovered at 425 for 20 minutes
15. take bread out of oven and rest on counter for 2 hrs
16. pray that the bread is good and enjoy!
notes: recipe consumes your entire life you will eat, sleep, and breathe pennywise
